---
name: Wrong check result
about: Report a false positive (flagged incorrectly) or false negative (missed something) in a check
title: "[Check] "
labels: validation
assignees: ""
---

## Which check is affected
Name the check or module (e.g. `osf_check`, `prereg_check`, `stat_effect_size`).

## What result did metacheck give
Describe the output or flag that was produced.

## What result did you expect
Explain why the result is incorrect — is it a false positive (flagged something that is fine) or a false negative (missed something it should have caught)?

## Example paper or input
Provide a DOI, OSF link, or minimal reproducible example that triggers the wrong result.

## Version
Which metacheck version are you using?
